# CodeHTML — Premium Custom Software Development Studio

> CodeHTML is a Dubai-based custom software development studio founded in 2024 by Sandesh Agrawal. We specialize in building custom React websites, SaaS platforms, web applications, database portals, and iOS/Android mobile apps. We serve clients in UAE, India, Singapore, UK, and USA.

## Company Identity
- Legal Name: CodeHTML Technologies
- Brand Name: CodeHTML
- Website: https://codehtml.in
- Type: Custom Software Development Studio
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Business Bay, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Founder: Sandesh Agrawal
- Contact Email: Contact@Codehtml.in
- Phone: +91 93032 28082

## What We Build
1. **Custom Websites** — React + Vite, no WordPress, no templates. 99+ Lighthouse performance scores.
2. **Web Applications** — CRM, ERP, dashboards, admin panels, database portals for enterprise operations.
3. **SaaS Platforms** — Multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing, custom business logic.
4. **Mobile Apps** — React Native for iOS and Android. Offline-first, push notifications, native performance.
5. **AI & Automation** — WhatsApp Business API bots, AI voice agents, workflow automation, chatbot systems.
6. **E-commerce** — Custom storefronts with payment gateways (Telr, PayFort, Stripe), inventory management.

## Key Facts
- 118+ platforms completed and delivered
- 99+ Lighthouse performance scores on all projects
- 3-5 day rapid delivery for MVPs and startup websites
- 100% code ownership transferred to client, zero recurring licensing fees
- Technologies: React.js, Vite, Node.js, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, React Native
- Currencies accepted: AED, USD, INR, GBP, SGD

## Pricing
- Startup Website: $200 / AED 750 / ₹15,000
- Growth System (Web App + Dashboard): $1,100 / AED 4,000 / ₹85,000
- Enterprise Protocol (Full Platform): $3,000 / AED 11,000 / ₹2,50,000

## Featured Projects
1. **Alaya Realty** (alayarealty.in) — Premium real estate consultancy portal in Dubai. Custom React build with property listings, broker routing, and 0.7s page load time.
2. **Swigato India** (swigatoindia.in) — Multi-city food licensing and restaurant onboarding platform. Handles compliance workflows across Indian cities.
3. **SLCC Construction** (slcc.in) — Construction portal with architectural blueprint visualization, project timelines, and quote generation system.
4. **Elgamingo** (elgamingo.store) — Online gaming e-commerce platform with instant digital product delivery and voucher generation.
5. **Crysta Media** (crystamedia.in) — Corporate digital marketing agency website with SEO optimization and lead conversion design.
6. **Cafe De Casa** — Modern cafe website with QR-based digital menus and mobile-first responsive design.

## Services by Location
### Dubai, UAE
- Custom website development (AED 750+)
- Web application development for DIFC, JLT, Business Bay, Marina companies
- Mobile app development (React Native)
- E-commerce with UAE payment gateways (Telr, PayFort)
- AI chatbot and WhatsApp automation

### India
- Custom software development (₹15,000+)
- SaaS platform engineering
- Database portal development
- Mobile app development

### United Kingdom (Remote)
- GDPR-compliant website development (£150+)
- Custom web applications
- E-commerce with UK payment gateways (Stripe, GoCardless)
